description: Perform quantitative DNA content analysis on a fluorescence microscopy image of human cancer cells located at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/cell_cycle/nuclei.tif. The analysis should include background subtraction (50-pixel rolling ball), nuclei segmentation using Otsu thresholding and watershed separation, and measurement of Integrated Density for particles with a size of 100-Infinity. Identify the G1 phase peak (mode) from the intensity distribution. Save the measurements table to ~/Fiji_Data/results/cell_cycle/measurements.csv, the histogram plot to ~/Fiji_Data/results/cell_cycle/histogram.png, and a text report containing the numeric G1 peak value to ~/Fiji_Data/results/cell_cycle/g1_peak_report.txt.
